description: A text container for supplementary 'other requirements' notes within undergraduate course entry requirement panels.

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Supplementary note about accepted science and technology subjects

props.children: Science and technology subjects include Biology/Human Biology, Chemistry, Computer Science, Electronics, Environmental Science, Further Maths, Physics and Design & Technology (including Textiles, Food Production, Product Design, Systems and Control Technology, and Design Engineering)

stories.name: ShortNote
stories.description: Short supplementary requirement note such as a GCSE requirement

stories.name: TLevelNote
stories.description: Supplementary note listing relevant T Level subjects

props.children: Relevant T Level subjects include: Maintenance, Installation & Repair for Engineering & Manufacturing; Engineering, Manufacturing, Processing & Control; Digital Production, Design & Development; or Design & Development for Engineering & Manufacturing

notes: Always appears inside a .paragraph--type--ug-other-requirements div within UG course entry requirements panels. The p:last-of-type sub-selector is covered by this component since it always contains a single p element. Accepts ReactNode children to allow for rich HTML content such as links and emphasis.
